subject: Warpworker.exe closing before M refinement complete
body:
Hello again everyone!

I seem to be running into an issue where the console running a 
Warpworker.exe during an M refinement closes sporadically (sometimes, 30% 
through and other times 75-80%). The M UI stays open but  is hung on a 
different .tif movie each time.

The Warp-1.0.9 install includes the 11-04-2020 nightly files.

I don't get an error message or anything written to the worker_*_crash.txt

This is for a 4kx4k K2 dataset of about 4k movies of 40 frames each being 
processed using a single 24 Gb GPU. 

I've tried reducing the parameters refined during a single iteration, but 
get the same result.
Using either GPU or CPU memory (128 Gb) for the particles doesn't change 
the sporadic Warpworker.exe closure.

Anyone else encounter something similar and have suggestions on what to try?

Curious if a brief interruption in the network connection could be causing 
this, but don't know how to test this beyond camping out at the computer 
screen for a few hours hoping to catch the crash live... 

Thanks for the help!

Cheers,
-Tom
